# init(imageProvider:)

**Initializer**

Creates a template that has a circular image.

## Declaration

```swift
init(imageProvider: CLKFullColorImageProvider)
```

## Parameters

- **imageProvider**: A full-color image provider.
title: init(imageProvider:)
